forecast-period.text: A high pressure system is located south of SA and is forecast to be centred over Tasmania on Thursday. The high will continue to extend a ridge over SA through to Saturday then a low pressure trough is expected to reach far western areas of the state on Sunday.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones.

Areas of patchy morning fog about the Agricultural Areas. Cold at first about the Flinders, Mid North and Murray districts with patchy frost. Isolated showers about parts of the southern coastal districts and over the Nullarbor Plain. Possible isolated thunderstorms about the Flinders district and southern parts of the pastoral districts. Maximum temperatures below average. East to southeasterly winds, tending northeasterly in the far west.
Isolated showers about southern coastal districts, possibly developing over the Nullarbor Plain. Northeast to southeasterly winds.

Isolated light showers possible about the Flinders district and southern parts of the pastoral districts. Areas of morning fog about the Agricultural Areas and possible patchy frost for the South East districts. Maximum temperatures below average. East to southeasterly winds, tending northeasterly in the far west.

Isolated light showers east of the ranges, possibly about the Northwest Pastoral district. Possible morning fog about the Agricultural Areas and possible patchy frost for the South East districts. Maximum temperatures below average. Northeast to southeast winds, tending east to northeasterly throughout the day.

text.p: Isolated showers possible in most districts. Maximum temperatures below average. North to northeasterly winds.

Cumulative rainfall totals to the end of Sunday: less than 2 mm for most districts, 2-5 mm possible about the Nullarbor and southern parts of the pastoral districts. Possible isolated falls of 5-10 mm for parts of the pastoral and eastern districts.
